name: golang-github-burntsushi-toml-dev
title: golang-github-burntsushi-toml-dev
summary: TOML parser and encoder for Go with reflection
description:
TOML parser and encoder for Go with reflection
TOML stands for Tom's Obvious, Minimal Language. This Go package provides a
reflection interface similar to Go's standard library json and xml packages.
This package also supports the encoding.TextUnmarshaler and
encoding.TextMarshaler interfaces so that you can define custom data
representations.
.
Compatible with TOML v1.0.0 (https://toml.io/en/v1.0.0).
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-burntsushi-toml-dev because TOML parser and encoder for Go with reflection.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-burntsushi-toml-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-burntsushi-toml-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-burntsushi-toml-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
